ACKS-CONTENT.Title: ACKS II — Content Streamer (PoC)
ACKS-CONTENT.tables.gmOnly: Only a GM can import rules tables into the world.
ACKS-CONTENT.tables.noProvider: No table host is active. Enable acks-location (it stores imported tables) and reload.
ACKS-CONTENT.tables.imported: acks-content: imported {tables} rules table(s) from your books into this world ({docs}). Market and hiring automation now uses your book values.
ACKS-CONTENT.tables.missingBooks: acks-content: some tables need books not connected on this seat ({books}). Connect them and re-run the import to fill the rest.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.connectNote: This browser can't reopen a file by itself (no File System Access API — usually an insecure origin, or Firefox). The file's NAME is remembered so next session can offer it back; you'll re-pick it each time. It is read locally only; nothing uploads or persists.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.connectNoteFsa: You'll pick the PDF next. Its LOCATION is remembered on this device (the text itself is never stored) — each session re-reads the actual file, so keeping the book is required.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.locationSaved: {book}: location remembered on this device. Descriptions stay in memory only.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.locationNameOnly: {book}: this browser can't reopen files on its own, so only the name "{name}" is remembered — you'll be offered it again next session.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectBody: These books are remembered on this seat but not open yet. Browsers ask for permission per file, per session — so each book gets its own button here.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectFailed: could not be opened. If the file moved, use Connect Your Book.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectHandle: remembered as {where} — one click unlocks it.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectUrlFailed: could not be read at {where} — has it moved?
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectFile: Last time this was "{name}". This browser can't reopen it on its own — choose it again.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectIncomplete: still not open: {books} — use Connect Your Book if the file moved.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectAllOpen: every remembered book is already open this session: {books}.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.reconnectNothing: no book locations remembered on this seat — connect one and it will be offered on every future join.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.statusNote: Books are read live from your files — prose is never stored.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.progressTables: Reading rules tables from your books…
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.abilIntro: {n} abilities available. Books connected this seat: {books}. Abilities always import with their name, classification and page reference; the mechanics and the rules text come from a connected book.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.abilAlias: Its rules text is printed under another entry; it does not stack with that one.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.abilDeprecated: Removed in ACKS II — imports with a caution.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.browseAbilitiesTip: Pick which proficiencies, powers and skills to import, filtered by category and name.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.importAllAbilitiesTip: Import every proficiency, power and skill the cookbook ships, as shared items. Already-imported ones are reused, never duplicated.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.updateAllAbilitiesTip: Refresh every ability in the world — loose items and the copies on actors — against the current cookbook. Ones with no cookbook id are matched by name and adopted.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.dynamicStub: {name} — full text: {book}, PDF p. {page}. Connect (or re-connect) your PDF on this seat to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.browseNote: Uses the book already connected this session; otherwise choose its PDF file (read locally in this browser — never uploaded).
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.browseFound: {n} extraction anchor(s) detected on {book}, PDF p. {page} — tick what to load:
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.browseDone: {n} document(s) created from {book} PDF p. {page} — tags persisted, prose cached on this seat only.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.kind.auto: Auto (MM heading → monster · RR/JJ heading → ability · entry → item)
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookTitle: Cookbook — import monsters from your book
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookIntro: {n} cookbook entries for {book}. Each import reads YOUR connected copy: stats, attacks (damage types + printed-color quality), spoils, and art. Descriptions stay lazy — actors carry only a page tag.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookAllConfirm: Import {n} monsters from {book} into the "{folder}" folder? Each one reads your connected PDF, so this takes a few minutes.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookAllConfirmSkip: {skipped} already in this world will be skipped.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookAllPresent: All {n} monsters from this book are already imported — nothing to do.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookDone: {done}/{picked} imported into the "{folder}" folder (details in console).
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.cookbookStub: {name} — full text: {cite}. Connect your PDF on this seat to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.mm.griffon: Monster — Griffon. Full entry: ACKS II Monstrous Manual, PDF p. 171. Connect your PDF (acksContent.connectBook) to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.combatReflexes: Proficiency — Combat Reflexes. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.blindFighting: Proficiency — Blind Fighting. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.berserkergang: Proficiency — Berserkergang. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.prof.combatFerocity: Proficiency — Combat Ferocity. Full text: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 110. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.item.grapplingHook: Equipment — Grappling Hook. Full description: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 145. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.item.herbWolfsbane: Equipment — Herb, Wolfsbane. Full description: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 145. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.pdftext.item.holyBook: Equipment — Holy Book. Full description: ACKS II Revised Rulebook, PDF p. 145. Connect your PDF to read it here.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.prunePrompt: {n} imported abilit(ies) point at definitions this module no longer ships — they were created by an earlier version and are now inert. Delete them?
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.pruneNone: No stale abilities — every imported ability still has a definition.
ACKS-CONTENT.ui.pruneAbilitiesTip: Remove imported abilities whose definition this module no longer ships. Lists them for confirmation first.
